items.name: 🦇 Ravenshade Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Unleash your dark elegance with the Ravenshade Coat — a gothic masterpiece of torn feathers and sleek shadow tones. Crafted with realistic PBR materials, this design blends mystery, power, and refined chaos. Perfect for fantasy, vampire, or shadow-themed avatars.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Dramatic feathered silhouette inspired by ravens and nightfall 🌒
Sharp tailored jacket design with flowing, jagged edges 🖤
PBR textures deliver realistic shine and depth for maximum style ⚡
Ideal for dark fantasy, gothic, and magic roleplay worlds 🕯️
🔍 Keywords: gothic, raven, dark, fantasy, coat, shadow, mage, vampire, PBR, Roblox
Embrace the night —
the Ravenshade Coat is your armor of elegance and darkness. 🕊️🔥
